free_text: Excitation function for deuteron induced nuclear
reactions on natural ytterbium for production of high
specific activity Lu-177g in no-carrier-added form
Natural Yb targets of nominal thickness of 25 mm with
a declared tolerance of 15% and a certified purity of
The true experimental value of targets thickness was
measured accurately by weighting on a wide surface,
25x25 cm2, before cutting the various targets.
The stack of thin foils consists of
alternating high purity Al, as recoil catcher and
energy degrader foils, natural Yb and one Ti beam
No self-absorption corrections of gamma photons
attenuation into the thin targets have been
introduced, due to the not very high Z and density of
target materials and the high energies of gamma
life, gamma emission intensity, decay branching) were
The uncertainties for cross-section and yield
measurement results take into account the summation of
several errors (type A, ISO,2008) related to the error
